commands.disabled_when_knocked_out: You cannot use commands while knocked out.
gui.hardcorerevival.wait_for_rescue: Wait to be rescued or accept your fate.
hardcorerevival.configuration.allowAccep: Set to false to remove the Accept your Fate button and force players to wait out the timer.
If true, knocked out players are still able to fire bows.
hardcorerevival.configuration.allowComma: If true, knocked out players are still able to run commands. OPs are always able to run commands.
hardcorerevival.configuration.allowPisto: If true, knocked out players are still able to fire pistols from Mr Crayfish's Gun Mod.
hardcorerevival.configuration.allowUnarm: If true, knocked out players are still able to punch nearby enemies.
hardcorerevival.configuration.consecutiv: The threshold of seconds that knockout will be treated as a consecutive knockout. See resumeTimerOnConsecutiveKnockout and multiplyTimerOnConsecutiveKnockout.
hardcorerevival.configuration.continueTi: If true, the timer until death continues even if the player logs out.
hardcorerevival.configuration.disableInL: If true, Hardcore Revival will not be active when playing alone in multiplayer.
hardcorerevival.configuration.disableInS: If true, Hardcore Revival will not be active in singleplayer.
hardcorerevival.configuration.glowOnKnoc: If true, knocked out players will glow, making them visible through blocks.
hardcorerevival.configuration.instantDea: The source entity types that kill a player instantly, without a K.O. period.
The damage sources that kill a player instantly, without a K.O. period.
hardcorerevival.configuration.multiplyTi: The multiplier to apply to the time remaining on consecutive knockouts.
hardcorerevival.configuration.rescueActi: The time in ticks it takes to rescue a player. 20 ticks are one second.
hardcorerevival.configuration.rescueDist: The distance at which a player can rescue another.
hardcorerevival.configuration.rescueResp: Effects applied to a player when rescued, in the format "effect|duration|amplifier"
The food level to respawn with when a player was rescued, out of 20.
The amount of health to respawn with when a player was rescued, out of 20.
hardcorerevival.configuration.resumeTime: If true, the timer until death resumes from its last time on consecutive knockouts.
hardcorerevival.configuration.secondsUnt: The time in seconds in which a player can still be rescued from death. Set to 0 to disable the timer.
hardcorerevival.configuration.title: Hardcore Revival
